title: Claude API Sticker Shock: $100 a Week #minimax
summary: A video commentary questioning the cost-effectiveness of Claude API usage, suggesting that typical usage patterns result in approximately $100 per week in expenses. The title frames this as "sticker shock" implying the costs are surprisingly high.
